The pack is a clean descriptor-only AuditHint-tail → HRPermission-M06-foundation bridge (Risk A, 10 units, 7 security_audit + 3 implementation) that is fully consistent across `registry.js`, `validators.js`, `model.test.js`, the regenerated `hrx-people-contract.json`, the validate script, and the live plan/queue. The pack-level claim is descriptor-only (manifest production_ready:false/runtime_ready:false/implementation_layer:descriptor now; production_ready_flag hrx_audit_hint_hr_permission_bridge_descriptor_verified at closeout, matching the CP950 precedent of status production_ready + runtime_ready:false). The claim is fully supported by source inspection.

Implementation: registry.js HRX_CP951_PACK_BINDING (upstream CP00-950, next CP00-952/RP30.P06.M06.S04), HRX_CP951_REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS (M05 AuditHint subphases 7-13 = 7, M06 HRPermission subphases 1-3 = 3), HRX_CP951_REQUIREMENTS (deliverable security_audit:7/implementation:3, micro_title AuditHint:7/HRPermission:3), and createHrxCp951AuditHintHrPermissionBridgeDescriptor are well-formed. The shared createHrxDomainRows factory sets audit_hint_descriptor/audit_hint_security_audit_descriptor and hr_permission_descriptor, resolves entity_name to AuditHint/HRPermission, and forces every runtime/record-write/audit-event-write/policy-runtime/decision/bypass/runtime-receipt/real-data/credential field to false with separate_product_created=false, domain_bridge_descriptor/sensitive_hr_guard_required/h30_review_only/c30_read_only set as required. The descriptor spreads HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and HRX_BLOCKED_CLAIMS and keeps domain_entities AuditHint/HRPermission all-false.

Validators: validators.js validateHrxCp951AuditHintHrPermissionBridgeCoverage enforces range/risk/unit-count/distribution/section-row counts; validateHrxCp951AuditHintHrPermissionBridgeDescriptor enforces descriptor/source-descriptor type, authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required:true, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-952), per-row boundary fields, baseline decisions, domain-entity boundaries, Hermes packet (emits_runtime_receipt:false), Claude packet (read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), capabilities, safety gates, and no-leak guards; validateHrxPeopleContract pins latest_pack/latest_projection to CP00-951.

Evidence: model.test.js covers binding/coverage, descriptor boundary closure, and the generated contract with deepEqual(errors,[]). contracts/hrx-people-contract.json is regenerated and consistent (current_pack/latest_pack CP00-951, latest_projection HrxCp951AuditHintHrPermissionBridgeDescriptor, projections.cp951 present, authority_boundary runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-952, case_set section_count 2/row_count 10). scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs chains the full CP897->CP951 upstream/next binding sequence plus CP951 coverage/descriptor/contract/capabilities/safety-gate checks and is read-only. A grep of packages/hrx/src for writeFile/appendFile/child_process/spawn/fetch/http/process.env/require/eval returned no matches, confirming no write/network/runtime/secret capability. command-evidence.json records node --check x3, node --test, npm run rp30:hrx:validate, and git diff --check all exit 0; no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false.

Boundaries: Claude is read-only and not final approver everywhere (request read_only:true tools Read/Grep/Glob; descriptor authority_boundary and claude_packet). Enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation; human approval is required before runtime opens in CP00-952. The Hermes packet is deterministic_only with emits_runtime_receipt:false — control-plane review/evidence handling only, not product runtime (consistent with authority_boundary hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false). CP178+ hardening: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1228-byte valid JSON); no prior CP00-951 raw-output/review-receipt exists, so there is no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped/missing-field evidence improperly counted as valid (construction-inspection.invalid_review_attempts is empty). Changed-file scope matches active_pack_implementation_refs; the dirty progress-control-room files and untracked workbook/docx items are correctly preserved out of scope.

Pre-closeout posture is expected and honest: manifest status in_progress, adjudication/construction-inspection/claude-review-result all PENDING awaiting this review, and the broader closeout command set (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack/npm test/validate/spec:requirements/weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane) plus the Hermes gate and review receipt are pending finalization. The CP00-951 manifest closeout_state_policy block carries the correct CP951 production_ready_flag and cp00-951 review_receipt_ref, i.e., the stale-block P3 reported on CP00-950 is fixed here.
